Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class VoiceCallMetrics

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.VoiceCallMetrics
public class VoiceCallMetrics extends SObject

Java class for VoiceCallMetrics complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="VoiceCallMetrics">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AverageSCVCallDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AvgHandledDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AvgMessagesPerCall" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AvgSpeedToAnswer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InboundCallsAgentsConnected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MaxMessagesPerCall" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MaxSCVCallDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MetricsDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumACWInitiated" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumCallbackCallsCtrCompleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumHandledInboundCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumHandledOutboundCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumHandledTransferCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumInboundCallsCtrCompleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumInboundIVRAbandonCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumInboundQueueAbandonCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumOutboundCallsCtrCompleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumRecordedCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumSCVCallbackCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumSCVInboundCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumSCVOutboundCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumSCVTransferCalls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumSCVUniqueAgents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumSCVUniqueEndUsers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumTransferCallsCtrCompleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OutboundCallsAgentsConnected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalACWInboundMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalACWOutboundMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAgentInboundMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalHoldDurationMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalIVRInboundMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalMessages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalOutboundMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalQueueInboundMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
